data.title: Minimalistic Design
data.description: Reflects Apple's commitment to simplicity and elegance.
data.technical_spec: Use of whitespace, minimal text, and a clean visual hierarchy.

data.title: Consistent Branding
data.description: Reinforces Apple’s brand through consistent imagery and tone.
data.technical_spec: Strict adherence to Apple's branding guidelines for color, typography, and imagery.

data.title: Innovation Emphasis
data.description: Showcases cutting-edge technology and products prominently.
data.technical_spec: Interactive media and animations to highlight features and products.

data.title: User-Centric Approach
data.description: Focuses on delivering an engaging and user-friendly experience.
data.technical_spec: Regular usability testing and user feedback loops.

data.title: Global Accessibility
data.description: Ensures the site is accessible to a worldwide audience.
data.technical_spec: Multi-language support and compliance with international accessibility standards.
